Generated Narrative: CapabilityStatement ips-server-capability-statement

Sensotrend's IPS Server Capability Statement

  • Implementation Guide Version: 0.4.0
  • FHIR Version: 4.0.1
  • Supported Formats: json
  • Published on: 2026-03-12
  • Published by: Mikael Rinnetmäki

Note to Implementers: FHIR Capabilities

Any FHIR capability may be 'allowed' by the system unless explicitly marked as 'SHALL NOT'. A few items are marked as MAY in the Implementation Guide to highlight their potential relevance to the use case.

This CapabilityStatement instantiates the CapabilityStatement IPS Server Capability Statementversion: 2.0.0)

SHALL Support the Following Implementation Guides

  • http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ipa/STU1.1
  • http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/ips/STU2
  • http://hl7.eu/fhir/base/2.0.0
  • https://hl7.fi/fhir/finnish-base-profiles/2.0.0
  • https://hl7.eu/fhir/eps/xtehr

FHIR RESTful Capabilities

Mode: server

Capabilities by Resource/Profile

Summary

The summary table lists the resources that are part of this configuration, and for each resource it lists:

  • The relevant profiles (if any)
  • The interactions supported by each resource (Read, Search, Update, and Create, are always shown, while VRead, Patch, Delete, History on Instance, or History on Type are only present if at least one of the resources has support for them.
  • The required, recommended, and some optional search parameters (if any).
  • The linked resources enabled for _include
  • The other resources enabled for _revinclude
  • The operations on the resource (if any)

    SHALL$summary

name: SensotrendIpsServerCapabilityStatement
title: Sensotrend's IPS Server Capability Statement
purpose: The metadata about Sensotrend's IPS Server implementation, including the supported resources and operations.

operation.name: summary
operation.documentation: The server supports the basic summary operation, but no search parameters. The returned IPS document is always in the universal IPS format, and for the default patient.
